_comment: Detailed per-block documentation overlaying palette.json. Harvested from the PHP block classes (sys/workflow/block/*.php), platform-metadata schemas, and real VizWorkflow documents. 'required'/'optional' are block_properties keys (put them in the IR step's 'config', except where the IR has a dedicated field). 'outputs' are fields referenceable as {Label.field} afterwards.

adduser.usage: Creates a platform user account, or updates it if the email already exists (upsert by email). This is THE block for onboarding a person to the platform itself. New users get a password-reset hash; set sendmail='on' to send the welcome/invite email automatically.

required.name: display name
required.systemrole: system role/group id; OR use systemRoleName with the role's name

optional.systemRoleName: system role name (looked up if systemrole empty)
optional.sendmail: 'on' to send welcome email with set-password link

getuser.usage: Fetches platform user details by email. Use to check whether a user already exists before onboarding.

addusertolivespace.usage: Grants an existing platform user access to an app (livespace) with a role. This is THE block for app membership — separate from account creation (adduser) and from app data rows (insertssdata). Fails if the user owns the app or already has the role.

required.livespacerole: role id; OR use livespaceroleName with the role's name

optional.livespaceroleName: role name (looked up if livespacerole empty)

removeuserfromlivespace.usage: Revokes a user's access to an app (livespace).

getuserlivespaces.usage: Lists the apps (livespaces) a user is a member of.

setlanding.usage: Sets the landing page/dashboard a user sees after login.

sendmail.usage: Sends an email via the platform SMTP. Use for custom notifications beyond the automatic adduser welcome mail.

notify.usage: Sends an internal platform notification to a user.

backgroundworkflow.usage: Fires another workflow asynchronously (does not wait). Use for slow side-effects like bulk mails.

arrayextract.usage: Extracts values from data via regex/selector into an array.

downloadasfile.usage: Returns data to the caller as a downloadable file.

uniquevalidator.usage: Validates unique constraints across data before inserts.

processfile.usage: Parses an uploaded file (CSV/Excel) into rows.
